description: Scoped FS permission for explicit, user-initiated 'Save as…' / 'Pick backup folder' writes. The dialog plugin returns a path the user explicitly picked; we widen scope to common user-visible folders (Documents, Downloads, Desktop, Home) and to any local/removable drive root (D:, E:, …) so that user-chosen backup folders on USB / NAS / OneDrive drives can be written to. Silent writes still cannot escape %LOCALAPPDATA% because the default capability does not include these scopes — code only writes here after the user clicks through a native picker.
